Any computation can now be verified on-chain with constant cost."}],"\n",["$","$L18",null,{"level":2,"id":"the-scalability-endgame","children":"The Scalability Endgame"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Every blockchain faces the same constraint: on-chain computation is expensive because every node must re-execute every transaction.        // Verify the computation was done }"}]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"}"}]}]]}]}]}],"\n",["$","$L18",null,{"level":2,"id":"use-cases","children":"Use  "}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#6A737D","--shiki-dark":"#6A737D"},"children":"// Prove which model was ."}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#6F42C1","--shiki-dark":"#B392F0"},"children":"add_transactions"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"("}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#005CC5","--shiki-dark":"#79B8FF"},"children":"100"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":")"}]]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#D73A49","--shiki-dark":"#F97583"},"children":" ."}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#6F42C1","--shiki-dark":"#B392F0"},"children":"set_initial_state"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"("}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#6F42C1","--shiki-dark":"#B392F0"},"children":"State"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#D73A49","--shiki-dark":"#F97583"},"children":"::"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#6F42C1","--shiki-dark":"#B392F0"},"children":"default"}],["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292E","--shiki-dark":"#E1E4E8"},"children":"());"}]]}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line"}],"\n",["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#D73A49","--shiki-dark":"#F97583"},"children":"
